author: lOrm
content: Fixed. McpManager now tracks per-server ConnectionSpec, drops dead McpServer + clears cached tools on McpError::Transport, and reconnects on next access under a 1s/5s/30s backoff. After 3 failed reconnects the entry surfaces new McpError::ServerUnreachable. Tests fix629_* prove disconnect-detection, max-retries-unreachable, backoff-gating, and post-reconnect resume. 48 mcp tests pass, clippy clean on my files.
